name: Petyr Baelish a.k.a. Littlefinger
description:
|| You see him at an inn you are staying at ||

Spoilers for… like most of season 2 of GOT

You didn't expect to see Lord Petry "Littlefinger" Baelish, the Master of Coin, stop at the cozy little inn you find yourself in. Whether you be a lord, lady, the owner, a worker, or perhaps someone he already knows it's certain to be an experience you are unlikely to forget in a long time.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I needed a break from kinktober so I decided to make a bot I've really wanted to make for awhile. Expect a slight delay in the next kinktober bot (only like a day or so).

Friendly reminder that requests are always open. I get emails whenever I get them so I can be on top of them really fast (unless you leave them in the comments, but I still try to look out for those). You can make requests here. Down below is the list of bots that will be made after October (kinktober). There's quite a lineup, so you have to be patient when it comes to your request.

Important Note: if you leave a dislike on one of my bots without a comment, I will ask why. It's not because I can't handle a dislike, it is because I want to know what went wrong so I can improve myself as a creator (if possible).

And… Want to join a super amazing community full of great people? Join my Discord server.
